notes: v2.4.13 — eBOM ↔ Operations Planner linking: promote BOM rows into planner items in one click, dedicated eBOM tab inside the planner, two-way Engineer sync, auto-Done on revision release, bidirectional jump-highlight. Planner: CC items appear in My/Team Work, Group By Build/Project/Board/Group on the global table, Contributions panel ranks top contributors and filters table/timeline, owner chip on board headers, stable scroll across filter toggles, assignee-junction integrity fix. Project Dashboard (formerly Workspace): full-width redesign with Engineering/Build/Operations sections, Department Hours panel with over-budget flagging, Daily Hours stacked chart, Project Timeline with build bars, build-scope chip following nav selection. Websites Publishing Platform: side-by-side Live/Staging preview, in-app deploy modal, two-eyes approval with SHA ceremony, one-click Promote-to-prod with 2-click confirm, fullscreen + Copy URL on each pane, browser-shareable previews via redeem token. Customer Requests: contact pages on all 4 brand sites feed a new inbox under Operations Intelligence → Employee Management, CR-#### numbering, inline triage, encrypted PII at rest. BOM: "Loading BOM..." flicker eliminated structurally on every editable surface, Engineering Vendors tab added to Projects toolbar, vendor activations show up in BOM dropdown instantly, Proc-Mat-Spec column visuals cleaned up. CAPA: edit before implementation starts. Tickets: webp/gif/bmp attachments now convert and post to Teams reliably; Teams reply comments + attachments ingest correctly. Permissions: is_websites_admin + is_customer_requests_admin wired into level helpers. Four schema migrations (182–185).
